ddls:
CREATE TABLE "locations" (
  "location_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each location */,
  "location_name" TEXT /* Name of the location */,
  "region" TEXT /* Region where the location is situated */,
  "country" TEXT /* Country where the location is situated */,
  "latitude" REAL /* Latitude of the location */,
  "longitude" REAL /* Longitude of the location */,
  "population" INTEGER /* Population of the location */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the location */,
  "urbanization_rate" REAL /* Urbanization rate of the location */,
  "gdp_per_capita" REAL /* GDP per capita of the location */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("location_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sex" (
  "sex_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each sex category */,
  "sex_name" TEXT /* Name of the sex category (e.g., Male, Female) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the sex category */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("sex_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "age_groups" (
  "age_group_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each age group */,
  "age_group_name" TEXT /* Name of the age group (e.g., 0-10, 11-20) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the age group */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("age_group_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "causes" (
  "cause_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each cause */,
  "cause_name" TEXT /* Name of the cause (e.g., Heart Disease, Cancer) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the cause */,
  "icd_code" TEXT /* ICD code for the cause */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("cause_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "years" (
  "year_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each year */,
  "year_name" TEXT /* Year the data was collected */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("year_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "prevalence_data" (
  "data_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each prevalence data entry */,
  "location_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the location */,
  "sex_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the sex category */,
  "age_group_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the age group */,
  "cause_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the cause */,
  "year_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the year */,
  "prevalence_percent" REAL /* Prevalence percentage of the cause in the specified demographic and time period */,
  "confidence_interval" REAL /* Confidence interval for the prevalence percentage */,
  "sample_size" INTEGER /* Sample size for the prevalence data */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("data_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_prevalence_data_sex_id FOREIGN KEY ("sex_id") REFERENCES sex ("sex_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_prevalence_data_cause_id FOREIGN KEY ("cause_id") REFERENCES causes ("cause_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_prevalence_data_year_id FOREIGN KEY ("year_id") REFERENCES years ("year_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_prevalence_data_age_group_id FOREIGN KEY ("age_group_id") REFERENCES age_groups ("age_group_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_prevalence_data_location_id FOREIGN KEY ("location_id") REFERENCES locations ("location_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_files" (
  "file_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data file */,
  "data_id" INTEGER /* ID of the prevalence data entry the file belongs to */,
  "file_path" TEXT /* File path to the data file */,
  "file_size" REAL /* Size of the data file in MB */,
  "upload_date" TEXT /* Date the file was uploaded */,
  "file_format" TEXT /* Format of the data file (e.g., CSV, Excel) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("file_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_files_data_id FOREIGN KEY ("data_id") REFERENCES prevalence_data ("data_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "readme_files" (
  "readme_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each readme file */,
  "data_id" INTEGER /* ID of the prevalence data entry the readme file belongs to */,
  "file_path" TEXT /* File path to the readme file */,
  "file_size" REAL /* Size of the readme file in MB */,
  "upload_date" TEXT /* Date the file was uploaded */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("readme_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_readme_files_data_id FOREIGN KEY ("data_id") REFERENCES prevalence_data ("data_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., researcher, data analyst, admin) */,
  "affiliation" TEXT /* Affiliation of the user (e.g., university, organization) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "data_id" INTEGER /* ID of the prevalence data entry being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the data */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the data was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_data_id FOREIGN KEY ("data_id") REFERENCES prevalence_data ("data_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "metadata" (
  "metadata_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each metadata entry */,
  "data_id" INTEGER /* ID of the prevalence data entry the metadata belongs to */,
  "collection_method" TEXT /* Method used to collect the data */,
  "quality_control" TEXT /* Quality control measures taken */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Additional notes or comments about the data */,
  "citation" TEXT /* Citation for the data source */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("metadata_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_metadata_data_id FOREIGN KEY ("data_id") REFERENCES prevalence_data ("data_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "reports" (
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each report */,
  "data_id" INTEGER /* ID of the prevalence data entry the report is based on */,
  "report_name" TEXT /* Name of the report */,
  "report_type" TEXT /* Type of the report (e.g., PDF, CSV) */,
  "file_path" TEXT /* File path to the report */,
  "file_size" REAL /* Size of the report in MB */,
  "generation_date" TEXT /* Date the report was generated */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Additional notes or comments about the report */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reports_data_id FOREIGN KEY ("data_id") REFERENCES prevalence_data ("data_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_versions" (
  "version_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each version */,
  "data_id" INTEGER /* ID of the prevalence data entry being versioned */,
  "version_date" TEXT /* Date of the version */,
  "change_description" TEXT /* Description of the changes made in this version */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("version_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_versions_data_id FOREIGN KEY ("data_id") REFERENCES prevalence_data ("data_id")
)
